vocab.translation: un mal que viene para bien

lessons.title: Phrasal verbs avanzados
lessons.topic: account for, rule out, water down, gloss over, bring about

items.prompt: ¿Qué phrasal verb completa correctamente la frase?
options: The proposal was watered down to appease the critics.
The proposal was glossed down to appease the critics.
The proposal was ruled down to appease the critics.
items.value: The proposal was watered down to appease the critics.

items.prompt: Completa el phrasal verb:
items.text: Investigators have not yet ___ out foul play.
accepted: ruled
items.value: ruled

items.prompt: Empareja el phrasal verb con su significado:
Traduce al inglés (usa un phrasal natural): "El informe pasó por alto los costes reales."
items.source: El informe pasó por alto los costes reales.
items.value: The report glossed over the real costs.
accepted: The report glossed over the real costs.
The report glossed over the actual costs.
The report glossed over the true costs.

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: These reforms brought about lasting change.
These reforms ruled out lasting change.
These reforms watered down lasting change.
items.value: These reforms brought about lasting change.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: The minister glossed over the failures and accounted for only the successes.

items.prompt: ¿Qué significa "account for" en "Poor planning accounts for the delay"?
options: explica / es la causa de
compensa económicamente
da por terminado
items.value: explica / es la causa de

items.prompt: Completa el phrasal verb:
items.text: The new policy will bring ___ sweeping reforms.
accepted: about
items.value: about

lessons.title: Idioms de uso genuino
lessons.topic: a blessing in disguise, the tip of the iceberg, on the fence, a far cry from

items.prompt: ¿Qué significa "the tip of the iceberg" en contexto?
options: solo una pequeña parte visible de un problema mayor
la mejor parte de algo
algo frío e impersonal
items.value: solo una pequeña parte visible de un problema mayor

items.prompt: Empareja el idiom con su significado:
Arma la expresión: "Resultó ser un mal que vino para bien."
Traduce al inglés (usa un idiom natural): "Sigo indeciso sobre la oferta."
items.value: I'm still on the fence about the offer.
accepted: I'm still on the fence about the offer.
I am still on the fence about the offer.
I'm still sitting on the fence about the offer.

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: This is just the tip of the iceberg.
This is just the edge of the iceberg.
This is just the top of the iceberg.
items.value: This is just the tip of the iceberg.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: Losing that job was a blessing in disguise; the new role is a far cry from the old one.

items.prompt: "Their service is a far cry from what they advertise." ¿Qué implica?
options: es muy inferior a lo prometido
es idéntico a lo prometido
es ligeramente mejor
items.value: es muy inferior a lo prometido

items.prompt: Completa el idiom:
items.text: Honestly, these complaints are just the tip of the ___.
accepted: iceberg
items.value: iceberg

lessons.title: Understatement e ironía
lessons.topic: to put it mildly, by no means, par for the course, understatement

items.prompt: "The exam was, to put it mildly, challenging." ¿Qué tono transmite?
options: atenuación irónica: fue durísimo
entusiasmo sincero
total indiferencia
items.value: atenuación irónica: fue durísimo

items.prompt: Empareja la expresión con su significado:
pairs: suavizando lo que en realidad es fuerte

items.prompt: Ordena: "Delays here are par for the course."
items.value: Delays here are par for the course

items.prompt: Traduce al inglés (usa understatement natural): "No fue precisamente barato, por no decir más."
items.source: No fue precisamente barato, por no decir más.
items.value: It wasn't exactly cheap, to put it mildly.
accepted: It wasn't exactly cheap, to put it mildly.
It was not exactly cheap, to put it mildly.
It wasn't cheap, to put it mildly.

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: The result was by no means certain.
The result was by no means urgent.
The result was by no means recent.
items.value: The result was by no means certain.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: Calling the storm 'a bit of rain' was, to put it mildly, an understatement.

items.prompt: ¿Qué frase es un understatement típico?
options: "It's not bad," said about a brilliant performance.
"It's the best thing ever!"
"It's a complete disaster."
items.value: "It's not bad," said about a brilliant performance.

items.prompt: Completa la expresión:
items.text: The negotiations were by no ___ straightforward.
accepted: means
items.value: means

lessons.title: Registro y eufemismo
lessons.topic: formal vs coloquial, let go, reading between the lines, euphemism

items.prompt: En lenguaje corporativo, "We had to let some staff go" es un eufemismo de:
options: despedimos a empleados
ascendimos a empleados
contratamos a empleados
items.value: despedimos a empleados

items.prompt: Empareja el registro formal con su equivalente coloquial:
Arma la expresión: "Tienes que leer entre líneas."
Traduce al inglés (eufemismo natural): "La empresa tuvo que despedir a doscientas personas."
items.source: La empresa tuvo que despedir a doscientas personas.
items.value: The company had to let two hundred people go.
accepted: The company had to let two hundred people go.
The company had to let go of two hundred people.
The firm had to let two hundred people go.

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: Reading between the lines, she wasn't impressed.
Reading between the lines, she was impressed.
Reading beyond the lines, she wasn't impressed.
items.value: Reading between the lines, she wasn't impressed.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: Reading between the lines, the polite rejection was a euphemism for a firm no.

items.prompt: Ordena: "We may have to let you go."
items.value: We may have to let you go

items.prompt: ¿Cuál es la versión más formal de "We need to ask for more time"?
options: We need to request an extension.
We gotta ask for more time.
We wanna get more time.
items.value: We need to request an extension.

checkpoint.prompt: ¿Qué significa "par for the course" en "Long queues are par for the course here"?
options: lo habitual y esperable
algo excepcional
algo prohibido

checkpoint.text: We can't ___ out the possibility of human error.
accepted: rule

checkpoint.prompt: Empareja el idiom con su significado:
Traduce al inglés (usa un phrasal natural): "Sus declaraciones no explican el retraso."
checkpoint.source: Sus declaraciones no explican el retraso.
checkpoint.value: Their statements don't account for the delay.
accepted: Their statements don't account for the delay.
Their statements do not account for the delay.
Their statements fail to account for the delay.

checkpoint.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: They watered down the original demands.
They ruled out the original demands.
They glossed over the original demands.
checkpoint.value: They watered down the original demands.

checkpoint.text: To put it mildly, their response was a far cry from what we had hoped for.

checkpoint.prompt: Arma la expresión: "Es solo la punta del iceberg."
"We had to let her go" es un eufemismo de:
options: la despedimos
la dejamos ir de vacaciones
la ascendimos

checkpoint.prompt: Ordena: "This is by no means the end."
checkpoint.value: This is by no means the end

checkpoint.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: The reforms brought about real change.
The reforms glossed over real change.
The reforms ruled out real change.
checkpoint.value: The reforms brought about real change.
